name: Bill Cosby
abstract: William Henry Cosby Jr. ( KOZ-bee; born July 12, 1937) is an American former comedian, actor, and media personality.

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli
about_quotes.evidence: I had Bill Cosby’s “Why is There Air?” I don’t know how that record got in the house but I learned all the bits
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 18, 2023 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Red Holloway
about_quotes.evidence: I made an LP with him. We made an LP in about 4 hours and 20 minutes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Red Holloway interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 4, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Bill and I, we’ve always – he used to open for me... So we have a long – and also, my dog Jay Jake came from Bill. He sent me my dog. But it’s just nice to have friends that you can consider that
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Clark
about_quotes.evidence: I know one of the things that you – one of your close associates is Bill Cosby. ... Bill and I, we just do things off the top of our head.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terry Clark — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: James Moody
about_quotes.evidence: I was there where I played Elvis Presley, Ann-Margaret, Connie Stevens, Glen Campbell, the Osmonds, Liberace, did the Mike Douglas [phonetic sp.] TV shows, [indiscernible], Milton Berle, Jack Carter [phonetic sp.], Charlie Rich, Ike and Tina Turner, Bill Cosby, Lou Rawls
about_quotes.doc_title: James Moody — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Wendy Oxenhorn
about_quotes.evidence: Someone had the number for Bill Cosby’s agent, so I left word. I remember a week later I get a call and I hear this guy with this voice that sounds familiar go, “Wendy?” I was like, “Yes.” He goes, “This is Cos.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Wendy Oxenhorn interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 22, 2026
